name: ultrawide-business-growth-ppt
title: 超宽大屏商务增长 PPT

title_i18n.zh-CN: 超宽大屏商务增长 PPT

description: Generate ultrawide 3696×1008 venue-screen PPT decks in a business growth style — warm-white background, teal and champagne-gold silk flows, white large-radius cards, center-focused layout, low information density. Optimized for 11m×3m conference main screens.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 生成超宽会场大屏 PPT（3696×1008，适配 11m×3m 主屏）。浅暖白底，青绿+香槟金柔光流线，白色大圆角卡片，中心聚焦布局，低信息密度，适合品牌营销大会、商业化汇报、数据增长发布、案例复盘。
description_i18n.en: Generate ultrawide venue-screen PPT decks at 3696×1008px (11m×3m physical). Warm-white background, teal and champagne-gold silk flows, white large-radius cards, center-focused layout, low density. Ideal for brand marketing summits, business reviews, data growth presentations, and case study recaps.

query.zh-CN: 使用超宽大屏商务增长 PPT 风格，为 {{audience}} 将「{{topic}}」制作成一套 3696×1008 超宽大屏 PPT（适配 11m×3m 会场主屏）。浅暖白背景，底部与两侧加入低透明度青绿色与香槟金柔和流线，主标题居中，内容集中在中央安全区，白色大圆角卡片，远距离可读，低信息密度。页数由内容量决定，必须包含封面和结尾页。
query.en: Use the Ultrawide Business Growth PPT style to create a 3696×1008 venue-screen deck about {{topic}} for {{audience}} (fits 11m×3m conference main screen). Warm-white background with teal and champagne-gold silk flows, centered title, white large-radius cards, content concentrated in the central safe zone, low information density, readable from a distance. Slide count determined by content; must include cover and closing.

exampleOutputs.title: 超宽大屏商务增长 PPT 示例

inputs.name: audience
inputs.label: 受众
inputs.placeholder: 品牌商家与运营负责人

inputs.name: source_content
inputs.label: 补充素材（可选）
inputs.placeholder: 粘贴需要提炼成演示的素材
